report_title: OpenAI's Latest Product and Strategic Partnerships
introduction: OpenAI's latest product is GPT-5.2, a model series designed for professional knowledge work [4]
executive_summary: OpenAI has introduced GPT-5.2, a model series designed for professional knowledge work, and has announced strategic partnerships with Amazon and Broadcom [4, 5, 6]

key_findings.finding_summary: GPT-5.2 sets a new state of the art across many benchmarks, including GDPval, where it outperforms industry professionals, and beats or ties top industry professionals on 70.9% of comparisons on GDPval knowledge work tasks [4]

OpenAI's Aardvark, an agentic security researcher powered by GPT-5, has identified 92% of known and synthetically-introduced vulnerabilities in benchmark testing, and has discovered and responsibly disclosed numerous vulnerabilities in open-source projects [3]

official_insights.title: Introducing GPT-5.2
official_insights.brief_summary: OpenAI's latest product is GPT-5.2, a model series designed for professional knowledge work [4]
official_insights.overview: GPT-5.2 is the most capable model series yet for professional knowledge work, with improvements in general intelligence, long-context understanding, agentic tool-calling, and vision [4]
key_findings: GPT-5.2 sets a new state of the art across many benchmarks, including GDPval, where it outperforms industry professionals at well-specified knowledge work tasks [4]
GPT-5.2 Thinking beats or ties top industry professionals on 70.9% of comparisons on GDPval knowledge work tasks [4]
official_insights.analysis: GPT-5.2 demonstrates state-of-the-art long-horizon reasoning and tool-calling performance, and is exceptional at agentic data science and document analysis tasks [4]
official_insights.why_it_matters: GPT-5.2 can help with professional work, producing outputs at >11x the speed and <1% the cost of expert professionals, suggesting significant economic value [4]
official_insights.practical_significance: GPT-5.2 has the potential to unlock significant economic value for people, saving them time and increasing productivity [4]
official_insights.technical_context: GPT-5.2 is available in ChatGPT and the API, with new tools and improvements in areas such as interactive coding, code reviews, and bug finding [4]

official_insights.title: OpenAI acquires Software Applications Incorporated, maker of Sky
official_insights.brief_summary: OpenAI has acquired Software Applications Incorporated, the maker of Sky, a natural language interface for the Mac [2]
official_insights.overview: The acquisition aims to enhance the use of AI on computers by integrating Sky's deep macOS integration and product craft into ChatGPT [2]
key_findings: Sky is a powerful natural language interface for the Mac that understands what's on the screen and can take action using apps [2]
The acquisition will bring Sky's capabilities into ChatGPT, allowing it to help users get things done [2]
official_insights.analysis: The acquisition is a strategic move by OpenAI to bring AI directly into the tools people use every day, as stated by Nick Turley, VP & Head of ChatGPT [2]
official_insights.why_it_matters: The acquisition has the potential to make computers more empowering, customizable, and intuitive, as stated by Ari Weinstein, Co-Founder and CEO of Software Applications Incorporated [2]
official_insights.practical_significance: The integration of Sky's capabilities into ChatGPT may accelerate the vision of bringing AI directly into the tools people use every day [2]
official_insights.technical_context: The acquisition was led by Nick Turley and Fidji Simo and approved by the independent Transaction and Audit Committees of OpenAI's board of directors, with an investment fund associated with Sam Altman holding a passive investment in Software Applications Incorporated [2]

official_insights.title: Introducing Aardvark: OpenAI’s agentic security researcher
official_insights.brief_summary: OpenAI's latest product is Aardvark, an agentic security researcher powered by GPT-5, now available in private beta [3]
official_insights.overview: Aardvark is an autonomous agent that helps developers and security teams discover and fix security vulnerabilities at scale, using LLM-powered reasoning and tool-use [3]
key_findings: Aardvark identified 92% of known and synthetically-introduced vulnerabilities in benchmark testing [3]
Aardvark has discovered and responsibly disclosed numerous vulnerabilities in open-source projects [3]
official_insights.analysis: Aardvark's multi-stage pipeline identifies, explains, and fixes vulnerabilities, and it works alongside engineers, integrating with GitHub, Codex, and existing workflows [3]
official_insights.why_it_matters: Aardvark has the potential to tip the balance in favor of defenders in the field of software security, helping to discover and patch vulnerabilities before adversaries can exploit them [3]
official_insights.practical_significance: Aardvark can be used to uncover bugs such as logic flaws, incomplete fixes, and privacy issues, and it will be available to ChatGPT Enterprise, Business, and Edu customers via Codex web [3]
official_insights.technical_context: Aardvark uses GPT-5 and LLM-powered reasoning and tool-use to understand code behavior and identify vulnerabilities, and it does not rely on traditional program analysis techniques [3]

trusted_insights.title: Introducing GPT-5.2
trusted_insights.brief_summary: OpenAI's latest product is GPT-5.2, a model series designed for professional knowledge work [4]
trusted_insights.overview: GPT-5.2 is the most capable model series yet for professional knowledge work, with improvements in general intelligence, long-context understanding, agentic tool-calling, and vision [4]
key_findings: GPT-5.2 sets a new state of the art across many benchmarks, including GDPval, where it outperforms industry professionals at well-specified knowledge work tasks [4]
GPT-5.2 Thinking beats or ties top industry professionals on 70.9% of comparisons on GDPval knowledge work tasks [4]
trusted_insights.analysis: GPT-5.2 demonstrates state-of-the-art long-horizon reasoning and tool-calling performance, and is exceptional at agentic data science and document analysis tasks [4]
trusted_insights.why_it_matters: GPT-5.2 can help with professional work, producing outputs at >11x the speed and <1% the cost of expert professionals, suggesting significant economic value [4]
trusted_insights.practical_significance: GPT-5.2 can be used for tasks such as creating spreadsheets, building presentations, writing code, perceiving images, and handling complex, multi-step projects [4]
trusted_insights.technical_context: GPT-5.2 is available in ChatGPT and the API, with GPT-5.2 Instant, Thinking, and Pro rolling out to paid plans and available to all developers [4]

trusted_insights.title: OpenAI and Amazon announce strategic partnership
trusted_insights.brief_summary: OpenAI and Amazon have announced a multi-year strategic partnership to accelerate AI innovation, with Amazon investing $50 billion in OpenAI [5]
trusted_insights.overview: The partnership includes the development of a Stateful Runtime Environment powered by OpenAI’s models, available through Amazon Bedrock, and the expansion of access to OpenAI’s Frontier platform [5]
key_findings: OpenAI and Amazon are jointly developing a Stateful Runtime Environment [5]
AWS will serve as the exclusive third-party cloud distribution provider for OpenAI Frontier [5]
trusted_insights.analysis: The partnership aims to accelerate AI innovation for enterprises, startups, and end consumers, with a focus on stateful developer environments and advanced AI workloads [5]
trusted_insights.why_it_matters: The partnership has significant implications for the AI industry, with the potential to drive innovation and adoption of AI technologies [5]
trusted_insights.practical_significance: The partnership will enable developers to build and deploy AI applications more efficiently, with access to advanced models and infrastructure [5]
trusted_insights.technical_context: The Stateful Runtime Environment will be trained to run optimally on AWS's infrastructure, with integration with Amazon Bedrock AgentCore and infrastructure services [5]

references.title: Introducing GPT-5.2 - OpenAI
references.snippet:
Side-by-side comparisons show improved sophistication and formatting in spreadsheets and slides generated by GPT‑5.2 Thinking:

Prompt: Create a workforce planning model: headcount, hiring plan, attrition, and budget impact. Include engineering, marketing, legal, and sales departments.

To use the new spreadsheet and presentation capabilities in ChatGPT, you must be on a paid plan (Plus, Pro, Business, Enterprise) and select either GPT‑5.2 Thinking or Pro. Complex generations can take many minutes to produce.

#### Coding [...] ##### GPT-5.1

##### GPT-5.2

#### Science & math

One of our hopes for AI is that it will accelerate scientific research for the benefit of everyone. Toward this, we’ve been working with and listening to scientists to see how AI can speed up their work, and last month we shared some early collaborative experiments here⁠.

We believe GPT‑5.2 Pro and GPT‑5.2 Thinking are the world’s best models for assisting and accelerating scientists. On GPQA Diamond, a graduate-level Google-proof Q&A benchmark, GPT‑5.2 Pro achieves 93.2%, followed closely by GPT‑5.2 Thinking at 92.4%.

On FrontierMath (Tier 1–3), an evaluation of expert-level mathematics, GPT‑5.2 Thinking set a new state of the art, solving 40.3% of problems. [...] GPT‑5.2 Thinking is also better at front-end software engineering than GPT‑5.1 Thinking. Early testers found it significantly stronger at front-end development and complex or unconventional UI work—especially involving 3D elements—making it a powerful daily partner for engineers across the stack. See a few examples of what it can produce from a single prompt:

`Prompt:` `Create a single-page app in a single HTML file with the following requirements:  
- Name: Ocean Wave Simulation  
- Goal: Display realistic animated waves.  
- Features: Change wind speed, wave height, lighting.  
- The UI should be calming and realistic.`

Early testers shared their feedback on GPT‑5.2’s coding capabilities:

references.title: OpenAI acquires Software Applications Incorporated, maker of Sky - OpenAI
references.snippet:
Enhancing how people use AI on their computers.

Image 1: Abstract image with flowing gradients of soft blue tones and gentle light transitions, evoking the texture of smooth waves or sky movement.

Loading…

Share

AI progress isn’t only about advancing intelligence—it’s about unlocking it through interfaces that understand context, adapt to your intent, and work seamlessly. That’s why we’re excited to share that OpenAI has acquired Software Applications Incorporated, makers of Sky.

Sky is a powerful natural language interface for the Mac. With Sky, AI works alongside you, whether you’re writing, planning, coding, or managing your day. Sky understands what’s on your screen and can take action using your apps. [...] For Developers

OpenAI

October 23, 2025

Company

OpenAI acquires Software Applications Incorporated, maker of Sky

Enhancing how people use AI on their computers. [...] We will bring Sky’s deep macOS integration and product craft into ChatGPT, and all members of the team will join OpenAI.

“We’re building a future where ChatGPT doesn’t just respond to your prompts, it helps you get things done. Sky’s deep integration with the Mac accelerates our vision of bringing AI directly into the tools people use every day.” —Nick Turley, VP & Head of ChatGPT

“We’ve always wanted computers to be more empowering, customizable, and intuitive. With LLMs, we can finally put the pieces together. That’s why we built Sky, an AI experience that floats over your desktop to help you think and create. We’re thrilled to join OpenAI to bring that vision to hundreds of millions of people.” —Ari Weinstein, Co-Founder and CEO, Software Applications Incorporated

   For Developers [...] Aardvark represents a breakthrough in AI and security research: an autonomous agent that can help developers and security teams discover and fix security vulnerabilities at scale. Aardvark is now available in private beta to validate and refine its capabilities in the field.

How Aardvark works

Aardvark continuously analyzes source code repositories to identify vulnerabilities, assess exploitability, prioritize severity, and propose targeted patches.

See a few examples of what it can produce from a single prompt:

`Prompt:` `Create a single-page app in a single HTML file with the following requirements:

To use the new spreadsheet and presentation capabilities in ChatGPT, you must be on a paid plan (Plus, Pro, Business, Enterprise) and select either GPT‑5.2 Thinking or Pro. Complex generations can take many minutes to produce.

#### Coding [...] ##### Vision

| GPT-5.2 Thinking | GPT-5.2 Pro | GPT-5.1 Thinking |
 --- 
| CharXiv reasoning (no tools) | 82.1%  67.0% |
| CharXiv reasoning (w/ Python) | 88.7%  80.3% |
| MMMU Pro (no tools) | 79.5%  - |
| MMMU Pro (w/ Python) | 80.4%  79.0% |
| Video MMMU (no tools) | 85.9%  82.9% |
| Screenspot Pro (w/ Python) | 86.3%  64.2% |

##### Tool usage

| GPT-5.2 Thinking | GPT-5.2 Pro | GPT-5.1 Thinking |
 --- 
| Tau2-bench Telecom | 98.7%  95.6% |
| Tau2-bench Retail | 82.0%  77.9% |
| BrowseComp | 65.8% | 77.9% | 50.8% |
| Scale MCP-Atlas | 60.6%  44.5% |
| Toolathlon | 46.3%  36.1% |

##### Academic

references.title: OpenAI and Amazon announce strategic partnership - OpenAI
references.snippet:
OpenAI and Amazon (NASDAQ: AMZN)today announced a multi-year strategic partnership to accelerate AI innovation for enterprises, startups, and end consumers around the world.Amazon will also invest$50 billion in OpenAI, starting with an initial$15 billion investment and followed by another$35 billion in the coming months when certain conditions are met.

Partnering to bring new advanced AI capabilities to enterprises worldwide

OpenAI and Amazon are jointly developing a Stateful Runtime Environment powered by OpenAI’s models, which will be available through Amazon Bedrock. [...] OpenAI and Amazon will collaborate to develop customized models available to Amazon developers to power Amazon’s customer-facing applications. Amazon teams will be able to tailor OpenAI models for use across AI products and agents that serve customers directly. These capabilities will complement the models already available to Amazon developers, including Amazon’s Nova family, offering another tool for teams to build and deliver at scale.

OpenAI Amazon

> “OpenAI and Amazon share a belief that AI should show up in ways that are practical and genuinely useful for people. Combining OpenAI’s intelligence with Amazon’s infrastructure and global reach helps us put powerful AI into the hands of businesses and users at real scale.”

— Sam Altman, co-founder and CEO of OpenAI [...] This commitment spans both Trainium3 and next-generation Trainium4 chips and will power a broad range of advanced AI workloads. Trainium4, expected to begin delivery in 2027, will provide another major performance gain, including significantly higher FP4 compute performance, expanded memory bandwidth, and increased high-bandwidth memory capacity to support increasingly capable AI systems at scale.

Custom models available to power Amazon’s customer-facing applications

references.title: OpenAI and Broadcom announce strategic collaboration to deploy 10 gigawatts of OpenAI-designed AI accelerators - OpenAI
references.snippet:
“Broadcom’s collaboration with OpenAI signifies a pivotal moment in the pursuit of artificial general intelligence,” said Hock Tan, President and CEO of Broadcom. “OpenAI has been in the forefront of the AI revolution since the ChatGPT moment, and we are thrilled to co-develop and deploy 10 gigawatts of next generation accelerators and network systems to pave the way for the future of AI.”

“Our collaboration with Broadcom will power breakthroughs in AI and bring the technology’s full potential closer to reality,” said OpenAI co-founder and President, Greg Brockman. “By building our own chip, we can embed what we’ve learned from creating frontier models and products directly into the hardware, unlocking new levels of capability and intelligence.” [...] San Francisco and Palo Alto—October 13, 2025—OpenAI and Broadcom today announced a collaboration for 10 gigawatts of custom AI accelerators. OpenAI will design the accelerators and systems, which will be developed and deployed in partnership with Broadcom. By designing its own chips and systems, OpenAI can embed what it’s learned from developing frontier models and products directly into the hardware, unlocking new levels of capability and intelligence. The racks, scaled entirely with Ethernet and other connectivity solutions from Broadcom, will meet surging global demand for AI, with deployments across OpenAI’s facilities and partner data centers. [...] For Business
